charters.title: 001: Spelling Bee Game
charters.objective: Build a custom web-based Spelling Bee game with a 5-minute timer and daily scoreboard, shareable via link.

outstanding.text: Charter approved by David Kingsley — 2026-03-14
**Deploy publicly by 2026-03-15** — Game needs a public URL for Neural NeXus newsletter readers
Choose hosting platform (Railway / Render / VPS / Cloudflare Tunnel)
Set up deployment pipeline
Test public access
Generate shareable link for newsletter
Explore Substack integration (iframe embed or link-out with preview image)
Optional: custom domain/subdomain for the game

charters.title: 002: Neural NeXus Website
charters.objective: Build a professional website for the Neural NeXus newsletter brand — landing page, about, newsletter signup, and Spelling Bee game integration.

outstanding.text: Charter approved by David Kingsley — 2026-03-15 (fast-tracked for launch)

charters.title: Charter Dashboard
charters.objective: Persistent, browser-accessible dashboard to view and manage all project charters from any device on the local network.

charters.title: Project Management System
charters.phase: ✅ Built — Preview at http://localhost:8082 (pending David review)
charters.objective: Build a full-featured, browser-based project management dashboard that reads/writes charter files, tracks status, monitors deployed projects, and surfaces blockers — all from a single UI.

charters.title: Wordle Game
charters.objective: Build a daily Wordle word-guessing game for the Neural NeXus website. Same premium dark UI as Spelling Bee. New word every day, 6 guesses, color-coded feedback, shareable results.

charters.title: Substack to TikTok Converter
charters.objective: Automated pipeline that converts Neural NeXus Substack posts into TikTok-ready short-form video content, designed to drive traffic back to Substack for subscriber growth.
